content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Align wire, decompression, XML, text, HTML sanitation, search, pagination, bulk, and export limits so one stage cannot amplify another.

hints: For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Parser Render Query Budgets model · Theory Feed Go Parse…, name the reader, publisher, revision, Go, source, tenant, URL, feed format, XML, HTTP, PostgreSQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, API, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Go Parser Render Query Budgets precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Parser Render Query Budgets model · Theory Feed Go Parse…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory Go team handles case 4575 during an isolated backup restore exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove defense-in-depth SSRF, parser and query budgets, secrets, retention, deletion, and residual ownership; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Align wire, decompression, XML, text, HTML sanitation, search, pagination, bulk, and export limits so one stage cannot amplify another.

For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Parser Render Query Budgets model · Theory Feed Go Parse…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Each subsystem can choose an unrelated generous limit safely.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-parser-render-query-budgets-15geyn(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_parser_render_query_budgets_15geyn\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?threatCases < 12)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?blocked < 8 \|\| blocked > threatCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?retainedDataClasses < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unownedCriticalRisks > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
